1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="login__modal__user" data-piimask="true"></h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'findAndBook-trip-direction' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="stenaline-ui round-trip" name="findAndBook-trip-direction" type="radio" value="round-trip"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="sembo__link" data-cmp-clickable="true" data-cmp-data-layer='{"findAndBook-item-book-at-sembo":{"@type":"stenaline/components/findandbook-v2","repo:modifyDate":"2026-01-30T15:17:49Z","xdm:lin
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a data-cmp-clickable="data-cmp-clickable" data-cmp-data-layer='{"text-a99f8e1c0e-personvernerkl-ringen":{"@type":"stenaline/components/text","repo:modifyDate":"2025-02-05T08:30:58Z","xdm:linkURL":"/l
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til Ofte stilte spørsmål'

<a class="cmp-teaser__action-link" data-cmp-clickable="true" data-cmp-data-layer='{"teaser-06626f53fc-cta-ebfa580670":{"@type":"core/wcm/components/teaser/v1/teaser","repo:modifyDate":"2023-06-06T15:0
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input aria-describedby="form-text-1875005945-helpMessage" class="cmp-form-text__text" data-cmp-hook-form-text="input" id="form-text-1875005945" name="email" placeholder="Angi e-postadresse" required=
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'phonenumber' missing autocomplete attribute

<input aria-describedby="form-text-1449518022-helpMessage" class="cmp-form-text__text" data-cmp-hook-form-text="input" id="form-text-1449518022" name="phonenumber" placeholder="Angi mobilnummer" spell
Add autocomplete='tel' to help users fill in the form
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

aria-describedby references non-existent ID: 'form-text-1875005945-helpMessage'

<input aria-describedby="form-text-1875005945-helpMessage" class="cmp-form-text__text" data-cmp-hook-form-text="input" id="form-text-1875005945" name="email" placeholder="Angi e-postadresse" required=

MODERATE

aria-describedby references non-existent ID: 'form-text-1449518022-helpMessage'

<input aria-describedby="form-text-1449518022-helpMessage" class="cmp-form-text__text" data-cmp-hook-form-text="input" id="form-text-1449518022" name="phonenumber" placeholder="Angi mobilnummer" spell

Login

https://booking.stenaline.no/login?returnUrl=%2Fagent&isAgent=1
Avvik: 28 | Bestått: 29
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="spinner" src="/assets/img/ajax-loader.gif"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no headings

<body>
Add heading structure to organize page content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="nav clear-fix"> <ul class="nav-items float-r js-tabs"> <!-- todo: all functions instead of links should have the nofollow class on li --> <li class="nav-item"><a class="" href="/vanlige-sp
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="nav float-l breadcrumb-links"> <span class="icon"></span> <ul class="nav-items"> <li class="nav-item"><a href="/">Hjem</a>/</li> <li class="nav-item last-child">Logg inn</li> </ul> </nav>
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="/my-pages?page=My%20bookings"></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="" href="/vanlige-sporsmal" rel="noopener" target="_blank"><span class="">Kundeservice</span><span class=""></span></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#5c3e292f3532392f2f72282e3d2a39307232331c2f2839323d30353239723f3331" target="_blank">Send mail her »<br/> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="btn btn-normal btn-continue has-text-shadow halfgutter js-confirm" href="javascript:__doPostBack('main_1$maincol1_0$btRegUser','')" id="main_1_maincol1_0_btRegUser">Registrer agent</a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (5 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input id="main_1_maincol1_0_cbRememberAgent" name="main_1$maincol1_0$cbRememberAgent" type="checkbox"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input class="standard _required _groupMainAgentReg" id="main_1_maincol1_0_tbAgentIdPart" name="main_1$maincol1_0$tbAgentIdPart" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input class="standard _required _groupMainAgentReg" id="main_1_maincol1_0_tbPwdNew1" name="main_1$maincol1_0$tbPwdNew1" type="password"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id

CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input class="standard _required _groupMainAgentReg" id="main_1_maincol1_0_tbPwdNew2" name="main_1$maincol1_0$tbPwdNew2" type="password"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id

CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input class="standard _required _groupMainAgentReg" id="main_1_maincol1_0_tbEmail" name="main_1$maincol1_0$tbEmail" type="text"/>

Fergetilbud | Fergerabatter | Stena Line

https://www.stenaline.no/spesialtilbud
Avvik: 138 | Bestått: 232
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img data-cmp-hook-image="image" itemprop="contentUrl" src="https://s7g10.scene7.com/is/image/stena/20250306_SpringCampaign_MX6A1593:Special-Offer-Teaser-List-Item"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="cmp-sitenavigation__list-item-icon" src="https://s7g10.scene7.com/is/image/stena/language-1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="login__modal__user" data-piimask="true"></h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="cmp-sitenavigation" data-cmp-data-layer='{"sitenavigation-79833e08e8":{"@type":"stenaline/components/sitenavigation","repo:modifyDate":"2026-01-02T13:26:18Z"}}' id="sitenavigation-6d1b2566
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h2 class="login__modal__user" data-piimask="true"></h2>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h2 class="login__modal__user" data-piimask="true"></h2>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a data-cmp-clickable="data-cmp-clickable" data-cmp-data-layer='{"text-88a514e11b-personvernerkl-ringen":{"@type":"stenaline/components/text","repo:modifyDate":"2025-02-05T08:30:58Z","xdm:linkURL":"/l
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til Ofte stilte spørsmål'

<a class="cmp-teaser__action-link" data-cmp-clickable="true" data-cmp-data-layer='{"teaser-6919c65aa7-cta-ebfa580670":{"@type":"core/wcm/components/teaser/v1/teaser","repo:modifyDate":"2023-06-06T15:0
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

Forretningsvilkår | Stena Line

https://www.stenaline.no/juridisk/forretningsvilkar
Avvik: 124 | Bestått: 216
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="cmp-sitenavigation__list-item-icon" src="https://s7g10.scene7.com/is/image/stena/language-1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="login__modal__user" data-piimask="true"></h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="cmp-sitenavigation" data-cmp-data-layer='{"sitenavigation-79833e08e8":{"@type":"stenaline/components/sitenavigation","repo:modifyDate":"2026-01-02T13:26:18Z"}}' id="sitenavigation-6d1b2566
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)

<h2 class="login__modal__user" data-piimask="true"></h2>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed

<h2 class="login__modal__user" data-piimask="true"></h2>

MODERATE

<body>

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="login__modal__user" data-piimask="true"></h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="cmp-title__text">MORE-fordeler</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3

MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content

Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'findAndBook-trip-direction' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="stenaline-ui round-trip" name="findAndBook-trip-direction" type="radio" value="round-trip"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>

MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="cmp-sitenavigation" data-cmp-data-layer='{"sitenavigation-79833e08e8":{"@type":"stenaline/components/sitenavigation","repo:modifyDate":"2026-01-02T13:26:18Z"}}' id="sitenavigation-3f8a6451

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="read-more" data-cmp-clickable="" data-cmp-data-layer='{"mainBody-readMore":{"@type":"stenaline/components/text","repo:modifyDate":"2023-02-22T09:08:11Z","xdm:linkURL":"readMore","stenaline:l
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a data-cmp-clickable="data-cmp-clickable" data-cmp-data-layer='{"text-ba4b1e09f9-personvernerkl-ringen":{"@type":"stenaline/components/text","repo:modifyDate":"2025-02-05T08:30:58Z","xdm:linkURL":"/l
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til Ofte stilte spørsmål'

<a class="cmp-teaser__action-link" data-cmp-clickable="true" data-cmp-data-layer='{"teaser-c0924eeb36-cta-ebfa580670":{"@type":"core/wcm/components/teaser/v1/teaser","repo:modifyDate":"2023-06-06T15:0
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="cmp-sitenavigation__list-item-icon" src="https://s7g10.scene7.com/is/image/stena/language-1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)

<h2 class="login__modal__user" data-piimask="true"></h2>

<body>

Våre ruter | Stena Line

https://www.stenaline.no/ruter
Avvik: 135 | Bestått: 252
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="cmp-sitenavigation__list-item-icon" src="https://s7g10.scene7.com/is/image/stena/language-1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="login__modal__user" data-piimask="true"></h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="cmp-sitenavigation" data-cmp-data-layer='{"sitenavigation-79833e08e8":{"@type":"stenaline/components/sitenavigation","repo:modifyDate":"2026-01-02T13:26:18Z"}}' id="sitenavigation-6d1b2566
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h2 class="login__modal__user" data-piimask="true"></h2>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h2 class="login__modal__user" data-piimask="true"></h2>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a data-cmp-clickable="data-cmp-clickable" data-cmp-data-layer='{"text-0351a87d46-personvernerkl-ringen":{"@type":"stenaline/components/text","repo:modifyDate":"2025-02-05T08:30:58Z","xdm:linkURL":"/l
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til Ofte stilte spørsmål'

<a class="cmp-teaser__action-link" data-cmp-clickable="true" data-cmp-data-layer='{"teaser-05b0822a51-cta-ebfa580670":{"@type":"core/wcm/components/teaser/v1/teaser","repo:modifyDate":"2023-06-06T15:0
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input aria-describedby="form-text-1875005945-helpMessage" class="cmp-form-text__text" data-cmp-hook-form-text="input" id="form-text-1875005945" name="email" placeholder="Angi e-postadresse" required=
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'phonenumber' missing autocomplete attribute

<input aria-describedby="form-text-1449518022-helpMessage" class="cmp-form-text__text" data-cmp-hook-form-text="input" id="form-text-1449518022" name="phonenumber" placeholder="Angi mobilnummer" spell
Add autocomplete='tel' to help users fill in the form
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)

Duplicate ID found: 'header-item-logg_inn__bli_medlem-ddb92e87b6' appears 2 times

id="header-item-logg_inn__bli_medlem-ddb92e87b6"
Each ID must be unique on the page

Ferge til Nord-Irland | Reis med Stena Line

https://www.stenaline.no/ferger-til-nord-irland
Avvik: 155 | Bestått: 271
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img data-cmp-hook-image="image" itemprop="contentUrl" src="https://s7g10.scene7.com/is/image/stena/20200220_belfast-titanic-museum:Landscape-List-Item"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img data-cmp-hook-image="image" itemprop="contentUrl" src="https://s7g10.scene7.com/is/image/stena/20170720_derry-londonderry-peace-bridge:Landscape-List-Item"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="cmp-sitenavigation__list-item-icon" src="https://s7g10.scene7.com/is/image/stena/language-1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="login__modal__user" data-piimask="true"></h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'findAndBook-trip-direction' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="stenaline-ui round-trip" name="findAndBook-trip-direction" type="radio" value="round-trip"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="cmp-sitenavigation" data-cmp-data-layer='{"sitenavigation-79833e08e8":{"@type":"stenaline/components/sitenavigation","repo:modifyDate":"2026-01-02T13:26:18Z"}}' id="sitenavigation-3f8a6451
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Heading is empty

<h2 class="login__modal__user" data-piimask="true"></h2>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed

SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h2 class="login__modal__user" data-piimask="true"></h2>

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="read-more" data-cmp-clickable="" data-cmp-data-layer='{"mainBody-readMore":{"@type":"stenaline/components/text","repo:modifyDate":"2023-02-22T09:08:11Z","xdm:linkURL":"readMore","stenaline:l
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a data-cmp-clickable="data-cmp-clickable" data-cmp-data-layer='{"text-ba4b1e09f9-personvernerkl-ringen":{"@type":"stenaline/components/text","repo:modifyDate":"2025-02-05T08:30:58Z","xdm:linkURL":"/l
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til Ofte stilte spørsmål'

<a class="cmp-teaser__action-link" data-cmp-clickable="true" data-cmp-data-layer='{"teaser-c0924eeb36-cta-ebfa580670":{"@type":"core/wcm/components/teaser/v1/teaser","repo:modifyDate":"2023-06-06T15:0
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (2 avvik)

MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form

MODERATE

Personal data field 'phonenumber' missing autocomplete attribute

<input aria-describedby="form-text-1449518022-helpMessage" class="cmp-form-text__text" data-cmp-hook-form-text="input" id="form-text-1449518022" name="phonenumber" placeholder="Angi mobilnummer" spell

Ferge til Karlskrona og Gdynia | Stena Line

https://www.stenaline.no/ruter/karlskrona-gdynia
Avvik: 169 | Bestått: 304
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="cmp-image__image cmp-list__item-img" data-cmp-hook-image="image" itemprop="contentUrl" src="https://s7g10.scene7.com/is/image/stena/20221004_Stena-Ebba_001_2%3ALarge?ts=1718210255138&d
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="cmp-image__image cmp-list__item-img" data-cmp-hook-image="image" itemprop="contentUrl" src="https://s7g10.scene7.com/is/image/stena/20221004_Stena-Estelle_005_2%3ALarge?ts=1718210810113&am
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="cmp-sitenavigation__list-item-icon" src="https://s7g10.scene7.com/is/image/stena/language-1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="login__modal__user" data-piimask="true"></h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5 class="cmp-timetable-header">Avreise</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'findAndBook--mobile-trip-direction' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="stenaline-ui round-trip" name="findAndBook--mobile-trip-direction" type="radio" value="round-trip"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'cmp-findandbook-v2__low-fare-checkbox' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input class="stenaline-ui low-fares-checkbox" data-cmp-clickable="true" id="findAndBook--mobile--low-fares-checkbox" name="cmp-findandbook-v2__low-fare-checkbox" type="checkbox"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="cmp-sitenavigation" data-cmp-data-layer='{"sitenavigation-79833e08e8":{"@type":"stenaline/components/sitenavigation","repo:modifyDate":"2026-01-02T13:26:18Z"}}' id="sitenavigation-2072c6a2
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

SERIOUS

<h2 class="login__modal__user" data-piimask="true"></h2>

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="read-more" data-cmp-clickable="" data-cmp-data-layer='{"mainBody-readMore":{"@type":"stenaline/components/text","repo:modifyDate":"2023-02-22T08:07:38Z","xdm:linkURL":"readMore","stenaline:l

Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a data-cmp-clickable="data-cmp-clickable" data-cmp-data-layer='{"text-fc71c682bd-personvernerkl-ringen":{"@type":"stenaline/components/text","repo:modifyDate":"2025-02-05T08:30:58Z","xdm:linkURL":"/l

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til Ofte stilte spørsmål'

<a class="cmp-teaser__action-link" data-cmp-clickable="true" data-cmp-data-layer='{"teaser-4b86145e48-cta-ebfa580670":{"@type":"core/wcm/components/teaser/v1/teaser","repo:modifyDate":"2023-06-06T15:0
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input aria-describedby="form-text-1875005945-helpMessage" class="cmp-form-text__text" data-cmp-hook-form-text="input" id="form-text-1875005945" name="email" placeholder="Angi e-postadresse" required=
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'phonenumber' missing autocomplete attribute

<input aria-describedby="form-text-1449518022-helpMessage" class="cmp-form-text__text" data-cmp-hook-form-text="input" id="form-text-1449518022" name="phonenumber" placeholder="Angi mobilnummer" spell
Add autocomplete='tel' to help users fill in the form

MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="login__modal__user" data-piimask="true"></h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'findAndBook-trip-direction' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="stenaline-ui round-trip" name="findAndBook-trip-direction" type="radio" value="round-trip"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="sembo__link" data-cmp-clickable="true" data-cmp-data-layer='{"findAndBook-item-book-at-sembo":{"@type":"stenaline/components/findandbook-v2","repo:modifyDate":"2026-01-30T15:17:49Z","xdm:lin
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a data-cmp-clickable="data-cmp-clickable" data-cmp-data-layer='{"text-a99f8e1c0e-personvernerkl-ringen":{"@type":"stenaline/components/text","repo:modifyDate":"2025-02-05T08:30:58Z","xdm:linkURL":"/l
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til Ofte stilte spørsmål'

<a class="cmp-teaser__action-link" data-cmp-clickable="true" data-cmp-data-layer='{"teaser-06626f53fc-cta-ebfa580670":{"@type":"core/wcm/components/teaser/v1/teaser","repo:modifyDate":"2023-06-06T15:0
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

Personal data field 'phonenumber' missing autocomplete attribute

Ferge til Irland | Reis med Stena Line

https://www.stenaline.no/ferger-til-irland
Avvik: 167 | Bestått: 284

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="login__modal__user" data-piimask="true"></h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'findAndBook-trip-direction' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="stenaline-ui round-trip" name="findAndBook-trip-direction" type="radio" value="round-trip"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="cmp-sitenavigation" data-cmp-data-layer='{"sitenavigation-79833e08e8":{"@type":"stenaline/components/sitenavigation","repo:modifyDate":"2026-01-02T13:26:18Z"}}' id="sitenavigation-3f8a6451
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="read-more" data-cmp-clickable="" data-cmp-data-layer='{"mainBody-readMore":{"@type":"stenaline/components/text","repo:modifyDate":"2023-02-22T09:08:11Z","xdm:linkURL":"readMore","stenaline:l
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a data-cmp-clickable="data-cmp-clickable" data-cmp-data-layer='{"text-ba4b1e09f9-personvernerkl-ringen":{"@type":"stenaline/components/text","repo:modifyDate":"2025-02-05T08:30:58Z","xdm:linkURL":"/l
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til Ofte stilte spørsmål'

<a class="cmp-teaser__action-link" data-cmp-clickable="true" data-cmp-data-layer='{"teaser-c0924eeb36-cta-ebfa580670":{"@type":"core/wcm/components/teaser/v1/teaser","repo:modifyDate":"2023-06-06T15:0
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

Personal data field 'phonenumber' missing autocomplete attribute

aria-describedby references non-existent ID: 'form-text-1449518022-helpMessage'

Stena Danica | Ferge til Frederikshavn og Gøteborg | Stena Line

https://www.stenaline.no/ferger/stena-danica
Avvik: 174 | Bestått: 340
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="cmp-sitenavigation__list-item-icon" src="https://s7g10.scene7.com/is/image/stena/language-1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="login__modal__user" data-piimask="true"></h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'findAndBook-trip-direction' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="stenaline-ui round-trip" name="findAndBook-trip-direction" type="radio" value="round-trip"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="cmp-sitenavigation" data-cmp-data-layer='{"sitenavigation-79833e08e8":{"@type":"stenaline/components/sitenavigation","repo:modifyDate":"2026-01-02T13:26:18Z"}}' id="sitenavigation-16259864
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="read-more" data-cmp-clickable="" data-cmp-data-layer='{"mainBody-readMore":{"@type":"stenaline/components/text","repo:modifyDate":"2023-05-16T12:12:50Z","xdm:linkURL":"readMore","stenaline:l
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.mypaper.se/show/stenaline/latest_denmark.asp" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank" title="View our Onboard Shopping magazine">The Shop</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a data-cmp-clickable="data-cmp-clickable" data-cmp-data-layer='{"text-fcba23e5be-personvernerkl-ringen":{"@type":"stenaline/components/text","repo:modifyDate":"2025-02-05T08:30:58Z","xdm:linkURL":"/l
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til Ofte stilte spørsmål'

<a class="cmp-teaser__action-link" data-cmp-clickable="true" data-cmp-data-layer='{"teaser-1904a2e13a-cta-ebfa580670":{"@type":"core/wcm/components/teaser/v1/teaser","repo:modifyDate":"2023-06-06T15:0
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

<input aria-describedby="form-text-1875005945-helpMessage" class="cmp-form-text__text" data-cmp-hook-form-text="input" id="form-text-1875005945" name="email" placeholder="Angi e-postadresse" required=

MODERATE

Personal data field 'phonenumber' missing autocomplete attribute

Ferge til Frankrike | Reis med Stena Line

https://www.stenaline.no/ferger-til-frankrike
Avvik: 163 | Bestått: 279
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (6 avvik)

CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="login__modal__user" data-piimask="true"></h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'findAndBook-trip-direction' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="stenaline-ui round-trip" name="findAndBook-trip-direction" type="radio" value="round-trip"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="cmp-sitenavigation" data-cmp-data-layer='{"sitenavigation-79833e08e8":{"@type":"stenaline/components/sitenavigation","repo:modifyDate":"2026-01-02T13:26:18Z"}}' id="sitenavigation-3f8a6451
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="read-more" data-cmp-clickable="" data-cmp-data-layer='{"mainBody-readMore":{"@type":"stenaline/components/text","repo:modifyDate":"2023-02-22T09:08:11Z","xdm:linkURL":"readMore","stenaline:l
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a data-cmp-clickable="data-cmp-clickable" data-cmp-data-layer='{"text-ba4b1e09f9-personvernerkl-ringen":{"@type":"stenaline/components/text","repo:modifyDate":"2025-02-05T08:30:58Z","xdm:linkURL":"/l
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til Ofte stilte spørsmål'

<a class="cmp-teaser__action-link" data-cmp-clickable="true" data-cmp-data-layer='{"teaser-c0924eeb36-cta-ebfa580670":{"@type":"core/wcm/components/teaser/v1/teaser","repo:modifyDate":"2023-06-06T15:0
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

MODERATE

Personal data field 'phonenumber' missing autocomplete attribute

<input aria-describedby="form-text-1449518022-helpMessage" class="cmp-form-text__text" data-cmp-hook-form-text="input" id="form-text-1449518022" name="phonenumber" placeholder="Angi mobilnummer" spell

https://www.stenaline.no/

MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="login__modal__user" data-piimask="true"></h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'findAndBook-trip-direction' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="stenaline-ui round-trip" name="findAndBook-trip-direction" type="radio" value="round-trip"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="sembo__link" data-cmp-clickable="true" data-cmp-data-layer='{"findAndBook-item-book-at-sembo":{"@type":"stenaline/components/findandbook-v2","repo:modifyDate":"2026-01-30T15:17:49Z","xdm:lin
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a data-cmp-clickable="data-cmp-clickable" data-cmp-data-layer='{"text-a99f8e1c0e-personvernerkl-ringen":{"@type":"stenaline/components/text","repo:modifyDate":"2025-02-05T08:30:58Z","xdm:linkURL":"/l
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til Ofte stilte spørsmål'

<a class="cmp-teaser__action-link" data-cmp-clickable="true" data-cmp-data-layer='{"teaser-06626f53fc-cta-ebfa580670":{"@type":"core/wcm/components/teaser/v1/teaser","repo:modifyDate":"2023-06-06T15:0
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

MODERATE

Personal data field 'phonenumber' missing autocomplete attribute

<input aria-describedby="form-text-1449518022-helpMessage" class="cmp-form-text__text" data-cmp-hook-form-text="input" id="form-text-1449518022" name="phonenumber" placeholder="Angi mobilnummer" spell

MODERATE

Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page

1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)

CRITICAL

CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img data-cmp-hook-image="image" itemprop="contentUrl" src="https://s7g10.scene7.com/is/content/stena/travel-enjoy-hygge"/>

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="cmp-sitenavigation__list-item-icon" src="https://s7g10.scene7.com/is/image/stena/language-1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)

MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="login__modal__user" data-piimask="true"></h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'findandbook-v2-b172c881ca-trip-direction' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="stenaline-ui round-trip" name="findandbook-v2-b172c881ca-trip-direction" type="radio" value="round-trip"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content

MODERATE

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="cmp-multimodellist__fragment__element__value cmp-multimodellist__generic-content--fragment__buttonLink-element__value cmp-multimodellist__button ui-btn ui-btn--type-secondary ui-btn--clr-pri
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Lær mer'

<a class="cmp-multimodellist__fragment__element__value cmp-multimodellist__generic-content--fragment__buttonLink-element__value cmp-multimodellist__button ui-btn ui-btn--type-secondary ui-btn--clr-pri
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="cmp-multimodellist__fragment__element__value cmp-multimodellist__generic-content--fragment__buttonLink-element__value cmp-multimodellist__button ui-btn ui-btn--type-secondary ui-btn--clr-pri
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Ferge til Nynäshamn og Ventspils | Stena Line

https://www.stenaline.no/ruter/nynashamn-ventspils
Avvik: 169 | Bestått: 305
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="cmp-sitenavigation__list-item-icon" src="https://s7g10.scene7.com/is/image/stena/language-1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="login__modal__user" data-piimask="true"></h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5 class="cmp-timetable-header">Avreise</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'findAndBook--mobile-trip-direction' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="stenaline-ui round-trip" name="findAndBook--mobile-trip-direction" type="radio" value="round-trip"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'cmp-findandbook-v2__low-fare-checkbox' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input class="stenaline-ui low-fares-checkbox" data-cmp-clickable="true" id="findAndBook--mobile--low-fares-checkbox" name="cmp-findandbook-v2__low-fare-checkbox" type="checkbox"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'findAndBook-trip-direction' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="stenaline-ui round-trip" name="findAndBook-trip-direction" type="radio" value="round-trip"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="cmp-sitenavigation" data-cmp-data-layer='{"sitenavigation-79833e08e8":{"@type":"stenaline/components/sitenavigation","repo:modifyDate":"2026-01-02T13:26:18Z"}}' id="sitenavigation-2072c6a2
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

<h2 class="login__modal__user" data-piimask="true"></h2>

SERIOUS

<h2 class="login__modal__user" data-piimask="true"></h2>

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (5 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="read-more" data-cmp-clickable="" data-cmp-data-layer='{"mainBody-readMore":{"@type":"stenaline/components/text","repo:modifyDate":"2023-02-22T08:07:38Z","xdm:linkURL":"readMore","stenaline:l
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="cmp-timetable__button ui-btn ui-btn--type-primary ui-btn--clr-primary ui-btn--sz-m ui-btn--icon-arrow-right ui-btn--icloc-after" data-cmp-clickable="true" data-cmp-data-layer='{"timeTable":{
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="cmp-timetable__button ui-btn ui-btn--type-primary ui-btn--clr-primary ui-btn--sz-l ui-btn--icon-arrow-right ui-btn--icloc-after" data-cmp-clickable="true" data-cmp-data-layer='{"timeTable":{
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a data-cmp-clickable="data-cmp-clickable" data-cmp-data-layer='{"text-fc71c682bd-personvernerkl-ringen":{"@type":"stenaline/components/text","repo:modifyDate":"2025-02-05T08:30:58Z","xdm:linkURL":"/l
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til Ofte stilte spørsmål'

<a class="cmp-teaser__action-link" data-cmp-clickable="true" data-cmp-data-layer='{"teaser-4b86145e48-cta-ebfa580670":{"@type":"core/wcm/components/teaser/v1/teaser","repo:modifyDate":"2023-06-06T15:0
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (2 avvik)

MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input aria-describedby="form-text-1875005945-helpMessage" class="cmp-form-text__text" data-cmp-hook-form-text="input" id="form-text-1875005945" name="email" placeholder="Angi e-postadresse" required=

MODERATE

Personal data field 'phonenumber' missing autocomplete attribute

<input aria-describedby="form-text-1449518022-helpMessage" class="cmp-form-text__text" data-cmp-hook-form-text="input" id="form-text-1449518022" name="phonenumber" placeholder="Angi mobilnummer" spell
Add autocomplete='tel' to help users fill in the form

Utforsk våre destinasjoner | Stena Line

https://www.stenaline.no/destinasjoner
Avvik: 124 | Bestått: 239
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="cmp-sitenavigation__list-item-icon" src="https://s7g10.scene7.com/is/image/stena/language-1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="login__modal__user" data-piimask="true"></h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="cmp-sitenavigation" data-cmp-data-layer='{"sitenavigation-79833e08e8":{"@type":"stenaline/components/sitenavigation","repo:modifyDate":"2026-01-02T13:26:18Z"}}' id="sitenavigation-6d1b2566
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Stena Spirit | Ferge til Gdynia og Karlskrona | Stena Line

https://www.stenaline.no/ferger/stena-spirit
Avvik: 190 | Bestått: 374
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="cmp-image__image" data-cmp-hook-image="image" itemprop="contentUrl" src="https://s7g10.scene7.com/is/image/stena/4%3ALandscape-List-Item?ts=1712307355956&dpr=off"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="cmp-image__image" data-cmp-hook-image="image" itemprop="contentUrl" src="https://s7g10.scene7.com/is/image/stena/Stena%20Line%2027.12.21%20234%20(1)%3ALandscape-List-Item?ts=1712306795056&
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="login__modal__user" data-piimask="true"></h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'findAndBook-trip-direction' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="stenaline-ui round-trip" name="findAndBook-trip-direction" type="radio" value="round-trip"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="cmp-sitenavigation" data-cmp-data-layer='{"sitenavigation-79833e08e8":{"@type":"stenaline/components/sitenavigation","repo:modifyDate":"2026-01-02T13:26:18Z"}}' id="sitenavigation-16259864
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h2 class="login__modal__user" data-piimask="true"></h2>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed

SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h2 class="login__modal__user" data-piimask="true"></h2>

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="read-more" data-cmp-clickable="" data-cmp-data-layer='{"mainBody-readMore":{"@type":"stenaline/components/text","repo:modifyDate":"2023-05-16T12:12:50Z","xdm:linkURL":"readMore","stenaline:l
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.mypaper.se/show/stenaline/latest_poland.asp" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank" title="View our Onboard Shopping magazine">The Shop</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a data-cmp-clickable="data-cmp-clickable" data-cmp-data-layer='{"text-fcba23e5be-personvernerkl-ringen":{"@type":"stenaline/components/text","repo:modifyDate":"2025-02-05T08:30:58Z","xdm:linkURL":"/l
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til Ofte stilte spørsmål'

<a class="cmp-teaser__action-link" data-cmp-clickable="true" data-cmp-data-layer='{"teaser-1904a2e13a-cta-ebfa580670":{"@type":"core/wcm/components/teaser/v1/teaser","repo:modifyDate":"2023-06-06T15:0
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input aria-describedby="form-text-1875005945-helpMessage" class="cmp-form-text__text" data-cmp-hook-form-text="input" id="form-text-1875005945" name="email" placeholder="Angi e-postadresse" required=
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'phonenumber' missing autocomplete attribute

<input aria-describedby="form-text-1449518022-helpMessage" class="cmp-form-text__text" data-cmp-hook-form-text="input" id="form-text-1449518022" name="phonenumber" placeholder="Angi mobilnummer" spell
Add autocomplete='tel' to help users fill in the form

aria-describedby references non-existent ID: 'form-text-1875005945-helpMessage'

<input aria-describedby="form-text-1875005945-helpMessage" class="cmp-form-text__text" data-cmp-hook-form-text="input" id="form-text-1875005945" name="email" placeholder="Angi e-postadresse" required=
Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page

MODERATE

aria-describedby references non-existent ID: 'form-text-1449518022-helpMessage'

<input aria-describedby="form-text-1449518022-helpMessage" class="cmp-form-text__text" data-cmp-hook-form-text="input" id="form-text-1449518022" name="phonenumber" placeholder="Angi mobilnummer" spell

Reis til Litauen | Stena Line

https://www.stenaline.no/ferger-til-litauen
Avvik: 158 | Bestått: 274
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img data-cmp-hook-image="image" itemprop="contentUrl" src="https://s7g10.scene7.com/is/image/stena/20160816_kaunas-castle:Landscape-List-Item"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img data-cmp-hook-image="image" itemprop="contentUrl" src="https://s7g10.scene7.com/is/image/stena/20170712_klaipeda-dunes:Landscape-List-Item"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img data-cmp-hook-image="image" itemprop="contentUrl" src="https://s7g10.scene7.com/is/image/stena/20160705_vilnius-bell-tower:Landscape-List-Item"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="cmp-sitenavigation__list-item-icon" src="https://s7g10.scene7.com/is/image/stena/language-1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="login__modal__user" data-piimask="true"></h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'findAndBook-trip-direction' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="stenaline-ui round-trip" name="findAndBook-trip-direction" type="radio" value="round-trip"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="cmp-sitenavigation" data-cmp-data-layer='{"sitenavigation-79833e08e8":{"@type":"stenaline/components/sitenavigation","repo:modifyDate":"2026-01-02T13:26:18Z"}}' id="sitenavigation-3f8a6451
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h2 class="login__modal__user" data-piimask="true"></h2>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h2 class="login__modal__user" data-piimask="true"></h2>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="read-more" data-cmp-clickable="" data-cmp-data-layer='{"mainBody-readMore":{"@type":"stenaline/components/text","repo:modifyDate":"2023-02-22T09:08:11Z","xdm:linkURL":"readMore","stenaline:l
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a data-cmp-clickable="data-cmp-clickable" data-cmp-data-layer='{"text-ba4b1e09f9-personvernerkl-ringen":{"@type":"stenaline/components/text","repo:modifyDate":"2025-02-05T08:30:58Z","xdm:linkURL":"/l
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til Ofte stilte spørsmål'

<a class="cmp-teaser__action-link" data-cmp-clickable="true" data-cmp-data-layer='{"teaser-c0924eeb36-cta-ebfa580670":{"@type":"core/wcm/components/teaser/v1/teaser","repo:modifyDate":"2023-06-06T15:0
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input aria-describedby="form-text-1875005945-helpMessage" class="cmp-form-text__text" data-cmp-hook-form-text="input" id="form-text-1875005945" name="email" placeholder="Angi e-postadresse" required=
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'phonenumber' missing autocomplete attribute

<input aria-describedby="form-text-1449518022-helpMessage" class="cmp-form-text__text" data-cmp-hook-form-text="input" id="form-text-1449518022" name="phonenumber" placeholder="Angi mobilnummer" spell
Add autocomplete='tel' to help users fill in the form

MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>

Om Stena Line | Selskapsinformasjon

https://www.stenaline.no/om-stena-line
Avvik: 122 | Bestått: 230
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="cmp-sitenavigation__list-item-icon" src="https://s7g10.scene7.com/is/image/stena/language-1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="login__modal__user" data-piimask="true"></h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="cmp-sitenavigation" data-cmp-data-layer='{"sitenavigation-79833e08e8":{"@type":"stenaline/components/sitenavigation","repo:modifyDate":"2026-01-02T13:26:18Z"}}' id="sitenavigation-6d1b2566
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

https://stenaline.no
1-500

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://stenaline.no --max-pages 21 --format html
